title: Delete CAR MODEL VARIANT-reviewed-by-magazine-issue-with-rating Relationship
user_story:
As an API contributor
I want to be able to disconnect RATINGS from CAR MODEL VARIANTS

description:
* The ›reviewed-by-magazine-issue-with-rating‹ relationship is deleted when it actually exists. -> Status Code \`204\`
* A successful request returns with an empty body.
* Requests with invalid IDs are rejected. This can happen when there exist no nodes with the given IDs or when those nodes are from the wrong type. -> Status Code \`404\`
* Requests are rejected when there exists no ›reviewed-by-magazine-issue-with-rating‹ relationship between the provided nodes. -> Status Code \`404\`
